review_scope.scope: Source-first checkpoint-2 recovery review of the declared OpenSpec docs, runtime/platform source, user tooling, preserved stable artifacts, and the new real board/runtime evidence for disconnect clear, FAIL_SAFE_LATCHED command rejection, fail-safe dominance, and applied-turn suppression behavior.
notes: This rerun used new real board/runtime artifacts and kept simulator-generated artifacts out of the authoritative runtime proof bundle for checkpoint-2.
Board motor remained physically off during the new board tests, so the review treated the logs as runtime-path safety evidence rather than traction or tuning-quality evidence.

review_coverage.summary: Reviewed the declared runtime/platform/user-tooling implementation surface plus preserved and new real board/runtime artifacts. Source confirms remote lifecycle commands route only through motion_intent, turn suppression zeros only applied turn while preserving raw turn telemetry, and ClearRuntimeTuningSnapshot now clears has_last_seq/last_seq. Real board logs cover disconnect snapshot clear, FAIL_SAFE_LATCHED start/stop rejection, fail-safe dominance while tuning and override remain enabled, shaped remote stop, override TTL expiry, tuning-mode-off runtime behavior, and raw-versus-applied turn separation.
